prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `a680ac02`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package at [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a680ac02/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a680ac02/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a680ac02/generator.py). The rule is: keep only the colored hollow 4x4 square-frames, ignore the solid 4x4 blocks, then pack the kept frames with no gaps, top-to-bottom if their overall spread is taller than wide and otherwise left-to-right.

`arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry for `a680ac02`; the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint matched the official examples and was used. No new primitive was needed. The generator stays on-family by explicitly placing 2-3 hollow 4x4 frames plus 2-3 solid 4x4 distractor blocks on sparse zero canvases, then deriving the output from the hollow subset.

Validation passed:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task a680ac02`
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task a680ac02 --n-examples 1000`
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task a680ac02`
- Visual sanity check on the preview sheet

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a680ac02/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a680ac02/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a680ac02/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a680ac02/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a680ac02/previews/preview_03.png).
